nodes.name: SetConfig
nodes.notes: ENV: NEWSAPI_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, GITHUB_TOKEN, GITHUB_OWNER, GITHUB_REPO, (optional) GITHUB_BRANCH

nodes.name: NewsFetch
nodes.notes: Query parameters driven by SetConfig to avoid invalid URL

nodes.name: ParseLLMPayload
nodes.notes: Normalize OpenAI content arrays into structured payload

nodes.name: MakeImageJobs
nodes.notes: Create image jobs using parsed payload

nodes.name: FinalizeImages
nodes.notes: Emit once after image loop completes
